title: Other relief not affected
doc_html:
§2188. Other relief not affected

            The granting of any relief authorized under this Chapter shall not preclude any other relief authorized by law.

            Acts 2015, No. 242, §3.
doc_text:
§2188.  Other relief not affected
The granting of any relief authorized under this Chapter shall not preclude any other
relief authorized by law.
Acts 2015, No. 242, §3.
